policies.sentence: The health care personnel may enter and edit personal health information including historical values, immunizations, and office visit information but not notes, laboratory procedures, or family history
policies.subject: personnel

policies.sentence: The HCP can indicate that the patient has passed away by providing an appropriate diagnosis code
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The HCP can graph the height or weight of the patient over the last calendar years
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: For the patient, the HCP can choose either height or weight to graph
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The HCP can document medications, lab procedures, diagnoses, medical procedures, and immunizations
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The HCP may also add a patient referral
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: HCPs can return to an office visit and modify or delete the fields of the office visit
policies.subject: HCPs

policies.sentence: A patient’s DLHCP can add or delete a patient’s personal representative
policies.subject: DLHCP

policies.sentence: The administrator will maintain and update a listing of allowable immunizations that an HCP can use
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator will maintain a listing of allowable diagnoses that an LHCP can use
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator will maintain and update a listing of allowable drugs that an HCP can use
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator will maintain and update a listing of allowable laboratory procedures that an HCP can use
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: An LHCP chooses a chronic disease and a patient
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The system shall enable the administrator to add a new entry for a hospital or modify an existing hospital entry
policies.subject: system

policies.sentence: The administrator is not allowed through the system interface to delete an existing entry or modify the hospital ID number
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: A patient or personal health representative can choose to view a list of their own prescriptions
policies.subject: representative

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view a prescription list for a selected patient
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The HCP can edit patient information according to data format
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The HCP does not have the ability to enter or view the patient’s security question or password
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can schedule an appointment with a patient
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view a list of upcoming appointments
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The user can view appointment details
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view a comprehensive patient report
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view a list of requested reports
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A user can view physician satisfaction survey results
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: An HCP can create a lab procedure for a given office visit
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP can view a previously created lab procedure
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP can reassign a lab procedure to another lab technician if it is not in the testing state
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP can remove a lab procedure if its status is in transit or received
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view all patients with whom they have had an office visit
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The patient can select a diagnosis and view LHCPs who have handled that diagnosis
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: The administrator can assign a healthcare provider to hospitals
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: An LHCP can enter a user as part of the system
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A patient or representative can send a message to an LHCP
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient or representative can reply to a message
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: An LHCP can reply to a message
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A user can read messages from the inbox or outbox
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: A user can sort messages by sender, recipient, or timestamp
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: A user can apply filters to message viewing
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: An LHCP can refer a patient to another HCP
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: An HCP can view received referrals
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP can view previously sent referrals
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An LHCP or UAP can add or delete patients from a monitoring list
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: An LHCP can delete a patient from the monitoring list
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can configure which monitoring data types a patient should report
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A patient can report physiological measurements
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: An LHCP can view physiological monitoring data
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: The LHCP can select a patient to obtain additional information
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A UAP can report physiological measurements for patients
policies.subject: UAP

policies.sentence: A patient representative can report physiological measurements
policies.subject: representative

policies.sentence: A patient can report adverse events for medications
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient can report adverse events for immunizations
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A public health agent can view adverse event reports
policies.subject: agent

policies.sentence: A public health agent can view details of a specific report
policies.subject: agent

policies.sentence: A public health agent can remove an adverse event report
policies.subject: agent

policies.sentence: The administrator can record interactions between drugs
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator can view drug interaction information
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator can delete drug interaction information
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: The administrator can set session timeout policies
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: A user can change their password after answering a security question correctly
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: A patient or personal health representative may enter or edit their own demographic information
policies.subject: representative

policies.sentence: An HCP must enter a patient MID to edit demographic information
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP may enter or edit their own demographic information
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: An HCP may upload a photo of a patient
policies.subject: HCP

policies.sentence: A patient can designate or undesignate an LHCP as a designated provider
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient can search for an LHCP by name, specialty, or location
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient or representative can view personal health records
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient can view access logs sorted by role and date
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient or personal health representative can view a list of prescriptions sorted by start date
policies.subject: representative

policies.sentence: The LHCP can view a prescription list sorted by start date
policies.subject: LHCP

policies.sentence: A user can view a list of appointments whose date and time are equal to or later than the current datetime
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: The appointments in the list shall be ordered by appointment date and start time with the soonest upcoming first
policies.subject: date

policies.sentence: A user can view messages sorted by timestamp with the most recent first
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: A user can sort messages by timestamp in ascending or descending order
policies.subject: user

policies.sentence: A user can filter messages based on a timestamp range between a starting date and an ending date
policies.subject: user

environment.head: date
environment.full_value: between a starting date and an ending date

policies.sentence: A patient can report adverse events for drugs taken in the last months
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient can report adverse events for immunizations received in the last months
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A public health agent can view adverse event reports within a given time period
policies.subject: agent

policies.sentence: Electronic sessions must terminate after a pre-determined period of inactivity
policies.subject: sessions

policies.sentence: The administrator can set the session timeout period
policies.subject: administrator

policies.sentence: Authorization must be disabled after a period of inactivity
policies.subject: Authorization

policies.sentence: A patient can view access logs sorted by date with the most recent access first
policies.subject: patient

policies.sentence: A patient can view access logs sorted by role and by date for each role with the most recent first
policies.subject: patient
